description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a tall, green picket fence, enclosing a spacious yard with several mature trees and landscaped areas. The structure features a low, horizontal profile with a flat or gently sloped roof, and a prominent front entrance pathway lined with trees. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with some brown accents suggesting wood or brick trim. The property includes a driveway or walkway leading to the main entrance, and the yard is divided into distinct zones, possibly for recreation or gardening. Windows are distributed across the facade, providing natural light and views to the outside, while the overall layout emphasizes openness and accessibility.
description: A single-story bungalow with a flat or gently sloped roof, surrounded by a green picket fence and landscaped with trees and pathways. The light-colored exterior and brown accents highlight its residential character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, tree-lined pathway, and the symmetrical arrangement of the yard within the fenced perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the property, the arrangement of trees along the side, and the extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, additional yard space, and the continuation of the green fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the side yard, more trees, and the overall rectangular layout of the property.
